title: Red Sox ace Garrett Crochet provided an injury update after bullpen session
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Garrett Crochet threw a 20-pitch bullpen session, the first since his shoulder injury in late April.
Crochet plans another bullpen session and to face live batters before potentially returning to the Red Sox rotation.
Crochet is recovering from shoulder inflammation caused by bad mechanics, aiming to improve mechanics and heal.

title: 1 dead, 3 injured in late-night boat crash at Logan Airport pier
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: A 24-year-old woman died in a boat crash at a Logan Airport pier late Wednesday night.
The boat carried one man and three women, who suffered non-life-threatening injuries, according to officials.
Massachusetts State Police are investigating the crash, which involved difficult conditions at the scene.

title: Maine game warden dies in plane crash during fish air-drop operation
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Maine Game Warden Joshua Tibbetts, 50, died in a plane crash during a fish air-drop operation in Avon, Maine.
The accident occurred around 11 a.m. near Schoolhouse Pond; no distress signals were sent before the crash.
Federal Aviation Administration and National Transportation Safety Board will investigate the aircraft and crash circumstances.

title: Boston has a secret society built on opium money in ‘The Society’
author: Lauren Daley
bullets: Karen Winn's novel 'The Society' explores a secret society in Beacon Hill built on opium fortunes.
The story follows Vivian Lawrence and Taylor Adams as they become entangled in the society's mysteries.
Winn was inspired by Boston's historical ties to the opium trade and her personal experiences in secret societies.

title: Local author’s buzzy graphic novel ‘A Kid Like Me’ tackles middle school, warts and all
author: Peter Chianca
bullets: Norm Feuti's graphic novel 'A Kid Like Me' explores middle school challenges from a New England perspective.
The novel features Ethan, a middle school student living in a trailer park, navigating friendships and fitting in.
Feuti draws on personal experiences of poverty and single-parent upbringing to create relatable narratives for children.

title: One of the most scenic drives in America is in New Hampshire
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: New Hampshire's Kancamagus Highway ranked 5th in USA Today's 2026 10Best Readers' Choice for scenic drives.
The 30-mile Kancamagus Highway offers views of the White Mountains and is known for its fall foliage.
USA Today's top scenic drive is Great River Road, spanning the Mississippi River from Minnesota to the Gulf Coast.

title: A Kennedy-listed Hyannis ‘dream’ home with private beach access — can you guess the price?
author: Emily Turner
bullets: A 5-bedroom 'dream' home in Hyannis, listed by the Kennedys, features private beach access.
The 3,165-square-foot property, built in 1966, includes 4 full bathrooms and 1 half bath.
The home has an annual tax of $12,042 and public sewer/water connections.

title: 10 best beach reads that should be on your list this summer
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: Boston.com lists 10 summer books recommended by readers and booksellers for New England beach days.
Selections include literary fiction, thrillers, and romances, ideal for various scenic New England beaches.
Recommendations involve reader and bookseller favorites alongside Boston.com staff picks for summer 2026.

title: Patriots to reportedly open 2026 season with Super Bowl LX rematch vs. Seahawks
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: The New England Patriots will open the 2026 NFL season against the Seattle Seahawks in a Super Bowl LX rematch.
The game, a rematch of Seattle's 29-13 Super Bowl victory, will be played at Seattle's Lumen Field on September 9.
The Patriots will also play the Detroit Lions in Munich, Germany, on November 15, as part of international NFL games.

title: 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s 3-0 loss to Nashville SC
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Revolution's seven-game unbeaten run ended with a 3-0 loss to Nashville SC at Gillette Stadium.
Nashville's Bryan Acosta scored twice, and Warren Madrigal took advantage of an error by goalkeeper Matt Turner.
Revolution coach Marko Mitrovic faces lineup decisions before Saturday's match against Minnesota United amid fixture congestion.
